    RepositoryRestMvcConfiguration.entityLinks(ObjectFactory<HateoasPageableHandlerMethodArgumentResolver> pageableResolver, Repositories repositories, RepositoryResourceMappings resourceMappings, org.springframework.plugin.core.PluginRegistry<BackendIdConverter, Class<?>> backendIdConverterRegistry, RepositoryRestConfiguration repositoryRestConfiguration, ObjectFactory<HateoasSortHandlerMethodArgumentResolver> sortResolver)
    A special EntityLinks implementation that takes repository and current configuration into account when generating links.

    BackendIdConverter.DefaultIdConverter
    The default BackendIdConverter that will simply use ids as they are.
